detectors.name: sqli
detectors.description: Tests query parameters, forms, and API-like inputs for error-based, boolean-based, and time-delay SQL injection signals.

detectors.name: xss
detectors.description: Checks reflected, DOM-rendered, and persistence-oriented XSS indicators across common input surfaces.

detectors.name: csrf
detectors.description: Flags state-changing forms and endpoints that appear to lack anti-CSRF protections.

detectors.name: auth_bypass
detectors.description: Looks for privileged or admin-style resources that are reachable without expected access controls.

detectors.name: advanced_surface
detectors.description: Safely flags GraphQL, OpenAPI, admin, upload, auth, and WebSocket surfaces for advanced validation workflows.

detectors.name: advanced_injection
detectors.description: Heuristically identifies NoSQL, command, LDAP, XPath, SSTI, XXE, and deserialization validation candidates.

detectors.name: advanced_client
detectors.description: Flags DOM XSS, stored/blind XSS, prototype pollution, and DOM clobbering candidate surfaces.

detectors.name: advanced_auth
detectors.description: Flags JWT, OAuth/OIDC, MFA/session, IDOR, BOLA, and RBAC bypass validation candidates.

detectors.name: advanced_server
detectors.description: Flags SSRF, file upload, traversal, cache poisoning, host header, WebSocket, race, and request smuggling candidates.

detectors.name: idor
detectors.description: Actively tests for Broken Object-Level Authorization by swapping resource IDs in paths and query params.

detectors.name: ssrf
detectors.description: Injects internal-network and cloud-metadata URL probes to detect full-read and blind SSRF.

detectors.name: api_authz
detectors.description: Tests API endpoints for missing authentication and HTTP method override vulnerabilities.

detectors.name: graphql_authz
detectors.description: Tests GraphQL introspection exposure, query depth limits, batching abuse, and unauthed access.

detectors.name: nosql
detectors.description: Tests for NoSQL operator injection and JavaScript injection on MongoDB/CouchDB-style backends.

detectors.name: ssti
detectors.description: Detects Server-Side Template Injection via safe math-expression probes with engine fingerprinting.

detectors.name: xxe
detectors.description: Tests XML-accepting endpoints for external entity injection via safe internal entity probes.

detectors.name: smuggling
detectors.description: Detects HTTP request smuggling via safe CL.TE/TE.CL timing differential probes.

detectors.name: race
detectors.description: Tests for race conditions via concurrent request replay on business-critical endpoints.

detectors.name: cache_poison
detectors.description: Detects web cache poisoning via unkeyed header injection and cache key analysis.

detectors.name: oauth
detectors.description: Tests OAuth/OIDC flows for open redirect, missing state parameter, and implicit flow misconfigurations.

detectors.name: rce
detectors.description: Safe command injection detection via non-destructive echo canaries and timing probes.

detectors.name: deser
detectors.description: Detects insecure deserialization via Java/Python/PHP/YAML probe payloads and error signatures.

detectors.name: cloud_exposure
detectors.description: Scans for sensitive file exposure, environment variable leaks, and cloud storage misconfigurations.
